title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: Comprehensive textbook covering a broad range of algorithms in depth.

title: Eloquent JavaScript
author: Marijn Haverbeke
description: A modern introduction to programming using JavaScript, with examples and exercises.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: Guidelines and practical advice for writing readable, maintainable code.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: David Thomas & Andrew Hunt
description: Timeless advice for software developers on pragmatic approaches and craftsmanship.

title: Design Patterns: Elements of Reusable Object-Oriented Software
author: Erich Gamma et al.
description: Classic book describing common object-oriented design patterns.
